title: Investment Case & Market Positioning
subtitle: Sourced from CLFI, Houlihan Lokey, Moore Kingston Smith, UKHospitality — 2024/25

benchmarks.sources: Sources: CLFI M&A Monitor H1 2025 · Houlihan Lokey Hospitality H1 2025 · Moore Kingston Smith 2025

noMultiple.title: ✓ Not a multiple expansion bet
noMultiple.sub: Returns driven by operating cash flow

cashDay1.title: ✓ Cash-yielding from Day 1
cashDay1.sub: Distributions begin at end of Year 1

nics.response: Labour cost increases are built into the forecast model — not hidden

nmw.response: Wage inflation modelled at 2025 actual base — no optimistic assumption

rates.response: Cost environment is baked in — not a pre-cost-shock baseline

closures.issue: UK hospitality recording ~2 site closures per day (2025)
closures.response: Sector pressure creates acquisition opportunity at realistic pricing

consumer.issue: Consumer behaviour shifting toward experience-led, low-alcohol spend
consumer.response: No Dice Borough's experience model directly aligns with this shift

pe.issue: PE firms cautious on single-country consumer exposure
pe.response: Smaller investor opportunity — less institutional competition for deal

proven.title: Proven Revenue Base
proven.text: £741,644 verified 2025 actuals. Not a projection — real trading history.

location.title: Prime London Location
location.text: Borough Market SE1: top footfall destination. 77,801 organic search sessions in 2025. Organic Search is the primary acquisition channel — Borough Market search terms actively maintained.

format.title: Experience-Led Format
format.text: Pool, board games, mini golf, DJ nights. Directly aligned with fastest-growing hospitality sub-sector.

streams.title: Multiple Revenue Streams
streams.text: Bar + activity pricing + events + corporate hire. Less dependent on drink-only margins.

ip.title: Brand IP Acquired
ip.text: Plonk trading name, customer data and goodwill purchased. Not starting from zero.

digital.title: Digital Acquisition
digital.text: Organic Search: 77,801 sessions in 2025 — the primary acquisition channel. Google Ads restarted Nov 2025 with proper tracking: 105 conversions, £0.32 CPC, £5.53 per conversion. Highly efficient when measured correctly.
